ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Nov-01-2016 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Oct-31-2016 Continued To Nov-14-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Sep-20-2016 Continued To Nov-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jon Vaught for (petitioner) Mary Haynes.

Mr. Vaught reported that they filed a petition to terminate for no assets yesterday but does not know the hearing date yet and that the estate consisted of one property that was foreclosed on. The status of filing a petition for final distribution was continued to November 1, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Continued To Sep-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jon Vaught (via court call) for (executor) Mary Haynes.

The Court stated that there was an Order to Appear on July 26, 2016 and that there was no appearance and that we are still looking for an Inventory & Appraisal and Petition for Final Distribution. Mr. Vaught stated that he expected the executor to be present in court this morning, that the only asset was real property which was foreclosed on two years ago and that there are no assets in the estate. The Court stated that counsel will need to close the estate on that basis and that there are procedures for doing such. Mr. Vaught asked if there would be a filing fee if there are no assets and asked if the court would waive the filing fee. The Court stated that it personally will not waive the filing fee, that there may be a way to waive the filing fee, that regardless the estate needs to be closed and that it will be very concerned if nothing is filed. The status of filing a petition for final distribution was continued to September 20, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Vaught stated that Ms. Haynes must be running late and may show up in court. The Court noted for the record that it is now 9:32 a.m.

Ms. Haynes did subsequently appear, was instructed to speak with her attorney and told that the estate needs to be closed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jul-26-2016 Continued To Aug-23-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the administrator Mary Haynes and the Attorney Jon Vaught to appear on August 23, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for final distribution has not been filed and why they did not appear. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
